sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel data documented for this title

special_mechanics.name: Limb Loss System
special_mechanics.description: Player character (Slick) loses individual limbs upon collision with enemies or hazards. After losing all limbs and taking additional damage, the head falls off causing loss of life.

special_mechanics.name: Limb Reattachment
special_mechanics.description: Collecting screwdrivers throughout levels reattaches lost limbs

tier_notes: Tier 3 data: No precise movement physics documented in available sources. Game is a platforming action title where player controls character Slick through five areas. Reviews noted 'poor control' (EGM) and criticized 'mandatory cheap hits by enemies' and difficulty. Only qualitative gameplay information available from contemporary reviews and Wikipedia/TCRF entries.
sources_used: The Cutting Room Floor - The Incredible Crash Dummies (SNES)
Wikipedia - The Incredible Crash Dummies (video game)
